hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean reduces information hunting and synthesis effort in customer-facing workflows, creating capacity for faster response and follow-up.
leading_indicators: covered CS search and assistant sessions
verification or review presence before customer-facing response

current_evidence_state.note: Covered Glean usage can show CS activity in search and assistant surfaces.
Synthetic case summaries and response artifacts support repeatable workflow evidence.
Response-time movement exists but requires attribution and baseline caveats.
No finance-approved recapture or cost translation is attached.

claim_templates_enabled: Covered evidence supports a contribution story for faster customer-response workflows.
Customer-facing claims must disclose baseline and attribution caveats.
upgrade_actions: Ask Finance to approve recapture, role-rate, and cost assumptions for CS response-time movement.
Validate baseline/control logic with Data Science before causal language is considered.
risks_and_caveats: Response-time movement may reflect customer mix, staffing, or process changes.
Do not claim Glean caused customer health improvement without stronger design.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean helps sellers find account context and draft planning artifacts faster, shifting time from manual preparation toward customer engagement.
leading_indicators: assistant drafting sessions for account planning
lagging_indicators: seller capacity released for customer-facing activity

current_evidence_state.note: Aggregate planning activity is visible across covered surfaces.
Reusable account-plan artifacts are present.
No approved planning-cycle or pipeline movement metric is linked.

claim_templates_enabled: Sales planning evidence shows repeatable account-planning support and reusable artifacts.
upgrade_actions: Connect account-planning activity to planning-cycle duration or customer-meeting preparation metrics.
Separate preparation efficiency claims from revenue or pipeline causality claims.
risks_and_caveats: Pipeline movement is influenced by market, account quality, seller behavior, and timing.
Do not claim revenue acceleration until business outcome evidence is validated.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean shortens discovery and debugging loops for engineers by making project context, technical references, and prior resolutions easier to find and summarize.
leading_indicators: workflow runs tied to onboarding or issue investigation

current_evidence_state.note: Engineering usage can be observed at aggregate surface level.
Engineering workflow runs are not yet linked to first-commit milestones.
No aggregate time-to-first-commit metric is linked.

claim_templates_enabled: Engineering evidence is directional and shows covered activity in discovery and troubleshooting workflows.
upgrade_actions: Link aggregate engineering activity to first-commit or issue-cycle metrics.
Define eligible engineering workflow cohorts before reporting.
risks_and_caveats: First-commit timing depends on project complexity, review process, and onboarding context.
Do not rank engineers or infer individual engineering productivity.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean helps users and support teams resolve questions through self-service discovery and reusable case context, reducing avoidable support demand.
leading_indicators: AI Answers engagement on support topics

current_evidence_state.note: Self-service discovery activity is visible in aggregate.
Reusable support artifacts exist but are not yet tied to deflection.
No approved support deflection or queue metric is linked.

claim_templates_enabled: Support evidence shows directional self-service and reusable case-context patterns.
upgrade_actions: Define a support deflection metric and link it to eligible self-service workflows.
Separate deflection from case avoidance, escalation reduction, and faster resolution claims.
risks_and_caveats: Case volume can shift due to seasonality, product changes, or support policy.
Do not claim deflection until outcome linkage is validated.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean-assisted incident workflows reduce context-gathering and coordination time while preserving reviewable control evidence.

current_evidence_state.note: Incident assistant runs are structurally observable.
Action logs are available but need action-class validation.
Control evidence supports internal governance review.
Incident response or containment movement is not yet linked.

claim_templates_enabled: Security incident assistant evidence shows governed, reviewable action patterns for covered workflows.
upgrade_actions: Link governed incident workflows to aggregate response or containment movement.
Have Security leadership approve customer-safe risk-reduction language.
risks_and_caveats: Security outcomes are sensitive and require policy-owner approval.
Do not claim prevented losses or reduced incidents from activity evidence alone.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean reduces reporting preparation and analysis time by connecting finance context, reusable artifacts, governed actions, and approved value assumptions.

current_evidence_state.note: Finance reporting activity is visible in aggregate.
Reporting artifacts are present.
Reporting workflow runs are not fully instrumented.
Reporting cycle-time movement is not yet linked.
Finance has not approved a value model for this workflow.

claim_templates_enabled: Finance reporting evidence shows reusable reporting support patterns.
upgrade_actions: Instrument reporting workflow runs and link them to cycle-time movement.
Have Finance approve value-model assumptions before finance-approved language.
risks_and_caveats: Finance reporting cycles can be affected by close calendar, audit needs, and data availability.
Do not claim finance-approved ROI until financial model evidence is present and validated.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean accelerates onboarding by helping new hires and HR partners find context, understand policies, and reuse onboarding artifacts.

current_evidence_state.note: Survey evidence supports perceived friction reduction but not outcome movement.
Onboarding-related activity is visible in aggregate.
Reusable onboarding artifacts are present.
No onboarding milestone movement is linked.

claim_templates_enabled: HR onboarding evidence shows directional and reusable onboarding-support patterns.
upgrade_actions: Link onboarding activity to ramp milestones or HR help-request movement.
risks_and_caveats: Onboarding outcomes vary by role, team, hiring cohort, and ramp expectations.
Do not expose person-level onboarding performance or manager views.

hypotheses.expected_value_mechanism: Glean agents and governed actions help assemble recurring business reports faster while preserving control evidence and finance-reviewed assumptions.

current_evidence_state.note: Recurring reporting runs are validated.
Actions are logged and action classes are validated.
Generated reporting artifacts are observable without raw content.
Control evidence supports governed action claims.
Reporting cycle movement is linked with caveats.
Finance-approved value assumptions are attached.

claim_templates_enabled: Finance-reviewed evidence supports a bounded value claim for governed agentic business reporting workflows.
Evidence supports covered value only within the approved reporting workflow and assumptions.
upgrade_actions: Monitor drift in reporting workflow coverage, control evidence, and financial assumptions.
Revalidate finance approval when pricing, recapture, or workflow scope changes.
risks_and_caveats: Finance approval is scoped to the synthetic workflow and approved assumptions.
Do not generalize this value claim to all agentic work.
